workflow_name: Quality Comparison: v0.7 Legacy vs v0.8 Quality Mode
description: Side-by-side comparison workflow showing legacy (v0.7) settings vs new v0.8 quality improvements. Process same input with both settings to see the difference.
note: This workflow creates TWO output sequences for A/B comparison

legacy_v07_branch.title: Legacy Flow Upscale (v0.7)
legacy_v07_branch.note: Legacy mode: guided filter without edge detection → flow bleeds across edges

legacy_v07_branch.title: Legacy Tile Warp (v0.7)
legacy_v07_branch.note: Legacy mode: linear blending → visible seams, no color matching → exposure discontinuities

legacy_v07_branch.title: Legacy Temporal (v0.7)
legacy_v07_branch.note: Legacy mode: fixed blend → ghosting in fast motion, flicker in slow motion, blends across scene cuts

quality_v08_branch.title: Quality Flow Upscale (v0.8)
quality_v08_branch.note: Quality mode: joint bilateral + Canny edges → no bleeding, sharp boundaries

quality_v08_branch.title: Quality Tile Warp (v0.8)
quality_v08_branch.note: Quality mode: raised cosine → seamless, color matching → uniform exposure

quality_v08_branch.title: Quality Temporal (v0.8)
quality_v08_branch.note: Quality mode: adaptive blend → no ghosting, scene cuts → clean transitions

tile_seams.legacy_v07: Visible linear gradient seams on uniform surfaces, especially sky/walls
tile_seams.quality_v08: Completely invisible seams with raised cosine blending

color_discontinuities.legacy_v07: Exposure jumps at tile boundaries, especially with vignetting

edge_halos.legacy_v07: Halo artifacts around high-contrast edges (flow bleeding)
edge_halos.quality_v08: Clean sharp edges with edge-aware refinement

temporal_artifacts.legacy_v07: Ghosting in fast motion, flicker in slow motion, blends across cuts
temporal_artifacts.quality_v08: Adaptive blending eliminates both, scene cuts handled correctly

inspection_tips.tile_seams: Look at uniform sky, walls, or gradients. Zoom to 100% and scrub through frames.
inspection_tips.edge_halos: Look at silhouettes against bright backgrounds (person vs sky). Check object boundaries.
inspection_tips.temporal_flicker: Play back at full speed. Legacy will flicker on slow motion, v0.8 should be smooth.
inspection_tips.ghosting: Check fast motion (hand wave, camera pan). Legacy shows double images, v0.8 should be clean.
inspection_tips.scene_cuts: If video has cuts, legacy will show blend artifacts across cut, v0.8 handles cleanly.
